structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output resets the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. The hot duct damper is closed. If cold duct supply air temperature is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is limited to the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling Loop output resets active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at active setpoint. Hot duct damper closed. If cold duct supply air temperature > room temperature, active cold duct airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed. 1. If cold duct supply air temperature from air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
verification_reason: repaired to verbatim section line evidence
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: section heading without supporting rule
